executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
CRITICAL CONTEXT FOR TEST GENERATION:
- This app uses Clerk for authentication. There is NO /login route. Auth is handled by Clerk's built-in UI (modal/redirect triggers when accessing any protected route).
- There is NO /pricing route. Pricing is a section on the landing page (scroll to #pricing).
- There is NO /dashboard route. After login, users land on /create.
- Protected routes: /create, /create/text, /create/image, /create/video, /connections, /scheduled, /posted, /studio, /userProfile
- Public routes: / (landing), /PrivacyPolicy (capital P), /tos
- The test account has an active Stripe subscription, 3 connected Pinterest accounts, 3 scheduled posts, and 2+ posted items.
- For auth tests: accessing any protected route like /create will trigger Clerk sign-in. Do NOT navigate to /login.
- For pricing tests: navigate to / and scroll to #pricing section. Do NOT navigate to /pricing.
- After successful login, expect to land on /create, NOT /dashboard.
- The /connections page now requires authentication via Clerk middleware. Unauthenticated users will be redirected to sign-in.
- The Reschedule button is now in the dialog footer (not header) and shows an inline reschedule form within the same dialog instead of opening a separate dialog.
